title: adman non-secret configuration
description: Portable plain-JSON NON-SECRET config (CONF-01/03/05). One shared schema used by BOTH the first-run wizard/init emitter and the loader (D-04), so the two entry points cannot drift. Secrets never live here; the opt-in DPAPI credential is a separate file (D-06). Keys prefixed '_comment' are stripped by the loader before validation (D-04), so the annotated example validates.

ManagedOUs.description: Distinguished-name roots the tool is allowed to mutate (SAFE-07). Empty (or absent) on a fresh install so the loader fails closed until configured (CONF-02).

DenyList.description: Hard floor of never-touch identities (SAFE-05), matched by objectSid/RID against (Get-ADDomain).DomainSID at check time - never by sAMAccountName (D-05). token is a non-secret RID suffix (500/501/502) or a well-known SID literal (e.g. S-1-5-32-544).

token.description: Non-secret RID suffix (500/501/502) or well-known SID literal.

bulkConfirmThreshold.description: At/above this target count the operator must type the exact count (SAFE-02). Default 5 (D-07).

bulk.description: Bulk-operation knobs. maxCount is a placeholder here; ENFORCEMENT lands in Phase 4 (BULK-02) and is NOT applied in Phase 0.

maxCount.description: Placeholder cap (Phase 4/BULK-02 enforces). Not enforced in Phase 0.

AuditDir.description: Local fail-closed audit directory (D-03). Default under gitignored .store/.

transport.description: Remote-operation fallback ladder and short timeouts (Phase 3; probed at startup, never hangs).

credentialPolicy.description: Non-secret metadata controlling the opt-in DPAPI remember-me flow (D-06). Carries NO credential value; consumed as-is by 00-03 Get-AdmanCredential.

allowRememberMe.description: When true, the remember-me consent is offered and a DPAPI file may be written (separate from this config). Default false (pass-through).

AdmanProtectedGroup.description: DN of the admin-maintained adman-Protected group (D-02); may be empty until created.

DC.description: Pinned domain-controller FQDN for -Server (Pitfall 1/6); empty => resolved at startup.

delegatedAdminGroup.description: SID of the team delegated-admin group used by the startup rights banner (MENU-05); environment-specific, supplied by the team (CONTEXT L77). Placeholder empty.
